Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-28-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendants' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Jun-15-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GATE GOURMET, INC, DOLORES MEJIA, BRETT APPLEBERG's Motion To Transfer Venue.

Defendants' motion for a mandatory change of venue is DENIED. The motion is untimely because the defendants already answered. (See CCP 396b(a); Easton v. Sup. Crt. (1970) 12 Cal.App.3d 243, 246.) Government Code 12965 is not a transfer-of-venue statute.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Off Calendar Mar-08-2018 Advanced From Mar-21-18 To Mar-15-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Waiver Of Objections To Plaintiffs Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Mar-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
HEARING RE DEFENDANT BRETT APPLEBERG'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM WAIVER OF OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY REQUESTS

APPEARANCES: TIFFANY T. TRAN, ESQ. of Seyfarth Shaw LLP (Tel: 916-448-0159) appearing for defendants Gate Gourmet, Inc., Dolores Mejia and Brett Appleberg;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Defense counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by Judge Pro Tem Charles Geerhart. The matter is uncontested and submitted without argument. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant Brett Appleberg's motion for relief from waiver of objections to plaintiff's discovery requests is GRANTED. The Court finds that defendant Appleberg has satisfied the requirements of CCP Sections 2030.290, 2031.300 and 2033.280 by providing substantially compliant responses to the discovery at issue and by showing excusable neglect (in the Appleberg Declaration) for not answering the discovery in a timely manner. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)
